summary: Iteration 7 features verified end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 new pytest cases pass (portal approve, expiry, notifications, share toggle, mark-read). Frontend UI: portal Approve button works unauthenticated, admin Recent Activity shows the approval, notif badge behavior verified, per-doc share toggle round-trips, client-status is now shadcn Select, portal-expiry offers Never/7/30/90d, header logo h-12 (34x48px), footer-admin-logo centered at x=960/1920 and links to /login.

issues: portal-expiry is still a native <select> (not shadcn). Requirement only mandated shadcn for Status; expiry native is functional but visually inconsistent with the new shadcn Status Select in the same modal.

action_items: OPTIONAL: convert portal-expiry to shadcn Select for visual consistency with client-status.
OPTIONAL (carried from iter6): wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText for copy-portal in try/catch.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/portal/{token}/approve is correctly public (no auth dep) and validates portal_expires_at via _portal_expired().
Portal document listing filter uses shared: {'$ne': False} so legacy docs without the field remain visible — correct behavior.
toggle_share endpoint casts payload.get('shared', True) to bool safely.
Notifications mark_read updates ALL unread (global). If multi-admin is added later, consider scoping notifications per user.
Portal expiry stored as ISO string; _portal_expired parses and compares against utcnow — OK.
seed_data_creation: test_iter7_features.py creates and cleans up its own TEST_Iter7_* client + quote doc. Post-run TEST_Iter7 clients were also deleted manually. Existing 'TEST_UI Client' quote EXD-Q-00003 was flipped to 'approved' during UI verification (visible on Dashboard Recent Activity and Documents table).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_features.py covers portal approve + notifications + share toggle + expiry. Testids: portal-approve-{i} on public portal, share-{docId} on Documents table (title text toggles between 'Shared to portal — click to hide' and 'Hidden from portal — click to share'), notif-bell + notif-badge in AdminLayout, client-status (shadcn combobox), portal-expiry (native select with values Never/7/30/90). Public portal must be opened in a fresh browser context WITHOUT ed_token. GET /api/portal/{token} filters docs with pdf_file_id present AND shared!==false.
